chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-1170 of 2024 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.5470/2022. 2. For hearing of main case. 29.09.2025 Mr. Ali Asadullah Bullo, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Wajiha Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General. ------------- Learned counsel for the petitioner states that he would be satisfied if this Court directs that the case of the petitioner for promotion be remanded to the competent authority which shall decide the same on its merits, in accordance with law, taking into consideration the petitioner’s service profile and any disciplinary proceedings that may be pending against him, if any. Learned Assistant Attorney General has no objection to such proposition. Order accordingly. This exercise shall be undertaken expeditiously. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Federal Secretary, Ministry of Science & Technology, Islamabad and The President, Board of Governors, the National Institute of Oceanography, Karachi for compliance. The instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro s
